title: Essex, Southend-on-Sea and Thurrock: Local government reorganisation
body: "Timeline  5 February 2025  The invitation letter sent to councils in ​Essex, Southend-on-Sea and Thurrock set out their milestones for reorganisation.  They were invited to submit final proposals for unitary local government by 26 September 2025.  19 November 2025  A written ministerial statement was made to Parliament. This set out that a statutory consultation on proposals for local government reorganisation in Essex, Southend-on-Sea and Thurrock was published.  The Minister of State for Local Government and Homelessness also wrote to the leaders of councils in Essex, Southend-on-Sea and Thurrock to thank them for their proposals and inform them of the consultation. "
